name: TRIIM-X extension registry study
summary: A randomized phase 2 registry study of a TRIIM-style combination regimen with epigenetic age, thymus regeneration, safety, and immunosenescence endpoints.

trial_details.expected_results_window: The Jun. 2, 2026 registry record listed recruiting status, May 2025 verification, and no posted results.
trial_details.horizon_note: Worth watching because it includes epigenetic-age, thymus, safety, and immunosenescence endpoints, but it remains a registry listing without posted results.
trial_details.why_it_matters: A randomized extension could clarify whether TRIIM-style endocrine regimens produce reproducible human biomarker or functional signals.
